title: Remove Copper
description: Removes copper, with iron replacing it in the few "uses" it has.
body:
Complete removal of copper from survival Minecraft.

No longer will your inventories and chests be filled with this useless ore, because "what if I want to build something with it one day.." (you won't)

- Copper ores do not generate
- Drowned do not drop copper ingots
- Spyglass, Lightning rod, Brush now crafted with iron ingots instead
- No new textures/models. You are welcome to make your own and fork the mod or send to me.
